scenario: W7+keyword-fix regression (GET-query PII block; you.com issues query, engine blocks at request intercept -> page replaced with 차단)
warning_text: ⚠️ 민감정보 차단 — [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다. (after hard-reload: ⚠️ 보안 경고 / 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.)
auth_state: anonymous (you.com search-bar path, no login required)
notes: Fresh submission ensuring the PII actually travels as a GET query (avoiding the past false-negative where PII was never submitted). Created a fresh tab and navigated to you.com/search?q=<URL-encoded PII>&fromSearchBar=true so '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' is carried in the request query string. Engine url_query_blocked fired immediately: page fully replaced with APF 'â  보안 경고 - APF' (⚠️ 민감정보 차단 / [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다). Hard-reload (Page.reload ignoreCache via CDP = ctrl+shift+r) confirmed page STILL REPLACED: title '보안 정책 - 접근 차단', body keyword '차단' present, PII still in URL query string. Matches baseline #1379/#1361/#1338/#1317/#1295/#1255. Confirms W7 scan_decoded_query_pii / url_query_blocked path unchanged. Verified via CDP Runtime.evaluate (no screenshots).
